title: Potion Brewing Basics
quickAnswer: Most useful potions start with Awkward Potion from nether wart. Redstone usually extends duration, glowstone usually strengthens effects, gunpowder makes splash, and dragon's breath makes lingering.
keyFacts: Blaze rods unlock brewing stands and blaze powder fuel, so fortress access is part of potion progression.
Not every potion supports both stronger and longer variants, so always check which upgrade path matters for the effect you want.
Core practical potions include Fire Resistance, Strength, Swiftness, Night Vision, Water Breathing, and Slow Falling.
commonMistakes: Skipping nether wart and trying to brew direct effects from water bottles.
Adding glowstone or redstone at the wrong stage and accidentally ruining the intended brew path.
